_codex_staging.notes: Travelers transcript source research deposit for FY Q1 2022 through FY Q1 2026. Official Travelers IR materials expose Q4 CDN transcript PDFs. Structured StockAnalysis rows are included as readable transcript fallbacks pending full direct PDF mapping.

research_scope: FY Q1 2022 through FY Q1 2026 inclusive
source_policy_applied: Readable earnings-call transcript text is accepted; source classification is provenance, not a blocker. Third-party rows retain usage_caution.

coverage_summary.primary_structured_source: StockAnalysis transcript pages with official Travelers PDF context
coverage_summary.official_source_context: Travelers IR-linked Q4 CDN transcript PDFs; StockAnalysis structured fallback
